title: Consumer sentiment hits record low, inflation fears rise amid Iran war
summary_full: The university's headline index of consumer sentiment tumbled to 47.6, down 10.7% from March to its lowest on record.
summary_public: The university's headline index of consumer sentiment tumbled to 47.6, down 10.7% from March to its lowest on record.
